title: Tragiella frieseana
intro: Tragiella frieseana, also known as African Tragi, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Bioactive constituents of Tragiella frieseana include alkaloids, flavonoids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Tragiella frieseana is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders.
